name: Lenny Rachitsky
title: Founder, Lenny's Newsletter & Podcast
bio_short: Former Airbnb PM. Runs the most-read product management newsletter and podcast. Known for rigorous, practitioner-grounded takes on what actually works in product.

name: Teresa Torres
title: Author, Continuous Discovery Habits
bio_short: Defined continuous discovery as a discipline. Most practically useful voice on how to build fast, lightweight feedback loops — especially relevant as AI makes it cheaper to build and easier to validate.

name: Simon Willison
title: Creator, Datasette · Independent AI Practitioner
bio_short: Prolific open-source developer and one of the sharpest, most honest practitioners writing about AI tools. Cuts through hype with working code and real-world tests — valuable for technical grounding.

name: Ethan Mollick
title: Professor, Wharton · Author, Co-Intelligence
bio_short: The most rigorous academic voice on how AI changes knowledge work and organizations. Empirical, measured, and consistently ahead of the hype — essential reading for anyone leading in the AI era.

name: Shreyas Doshi
title: Former PM Leader, Stripe · Twitter · Google
bio_short: One of the most precise thinkers on product craft. Known for frameworks that hold under pressure — especially on how AI reshapes what PM skills actually matter long-term.

name: Marty Cagan
title: Founder, Silicon Valley Product Group
bio_short: Author of Inspired and Empowered. The canonical voice on what separates strong product organizations from feature factories — increasingly relevant as AI reshapes team structure.

name: April Dunford
title: Author, Obviously Awesome · Positioning Expert
bio_short: The definitive voice on product positioning. Author of Obviously Awesome and Sales Pitch. Particularly relevant for anyone repositioning themselves or a product — cuts through vague strategy to executable narrative.

name: Andrej Karpathy
title: Founder, Eureka Labs · Ex-OpenAI · Ex-Tesla AI
bio_short: OpenAI co-founder, former Tesla AI Director. Now running Eureka Labs, an AI education company. Coined 'vibe coding.' The clearest explainer of where AI is actually heading, technically.

name: Josh Woodward
title: VP, Gemini & Google Labs (NotebookLM, AI Studio)
bio_short: Leads Gemini, Google Labs, NotebookLM, and AI Studio at Google. Named to TIME 100 AI 2025. The most product-forward thinker at Google on shipping AI — focused on making frontier capabilities widely accessible.

name: Aakash Gupta
title: Product Leader · AI × Product Strategy
bio_short: Highly active and well-respected product voice at the intersection of AI and product strategy. Known for clear, practical frameworks on how teams actually ship in the AI era.

name: Bob Moesta
title: Co-founder, The Jobs Company · Jobs-to-be-Done Pioneer
bio_short: Jobs-to-be-Done founder and practitioner. Brings deep, rigorous insight into how customers actually think about problems — essential for anyone building product that resonates.

name: John Cutler
title: Product Advisor · Systems Thinking for Product Teams
bio_short: Systems thinker focused on how product teams actually work. Highly cited for connecting psychology, team dynamics, and product execution — deeply practical on org-level product challenges.

name: Paweł Huryn
title: AI × Product Strategy Voice
bio_short: Sharp, actionable voice on the AI + product intersection. Current on what's shifting in how teams integrate AI into their workflow and product decisions.
